fund_name: SBI Children's Fund Investment Plan Direct Growth
text: SBI Children's Fund Investment Plan Direct Growth is a Equity mutual fund scheme from SBI Mutual Fund with a risk level rated as Very High. Latest NAV as of 2026-07-06 is ₹53.27.

fund_name: SBI Children's Fund Investment Plan Direct Growth
text: 1Y returns: 19.00%. 3Y annualised returns: 23.44%. 5Y annualised returns: 24.59%. Since inception returns: 117.29%. Compared with category 1Y average 2.19%. category 3Y average 15.99%. category 5Y average 15.61%.

fund_name: SBI Children's Fund Investment Plan Direct Growth
text: Risk level: Very High. Standard deviation: 15.95. Sharpe ratio: 1.05. Alpha: 10.44. Beta: 0.87.

fund_name: SBI Children's Fund Investment Plan Direct Growth
text:
Expense ratio is 1.13%. Exit load policy: With respect to units not subject to lock-in period and the holding period is less than
3 years: Exit load of 3% if redeemed within 1 year, 2% if redeemed after 1 year but within 2 year, 1% if redeemed after 2 year but within 3 year. Minimum SIP investment is ₹500. Minimum lump-sum investment is ₹5000. Taxation: If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.
